hero.title: Learn Chennai like a local.
hero.description: A simple mobile-first game to practice directions, neighborhoods, and city memory without making the interface feel heavy.
hero.panelTitle: 3 quick ways to learn the city
panelItems: Guess directions between real Chennai areas
Tap the right place on the map
Build a daily streak in small sessions

modes.title: Start simple. Learn steadily.
modes.subtitle: The first version focuses on short sessions, clear questions, and touch-friendly actions.

items.title: Direction Mode
items.description: Guess whether a place sits north, south, east, or west from another Chennai location.

items.title: Map Pin Mode
items.description: Tap the correct spot on the map to build stronger memory of Chennai neighborhoods.

items.title: Daily Challenge
items.description: Play five quick questions a day and keep a local streak going on your phone.

header.title: Pick two real places and play five quick questions.
header.subtitle: Search starts while you type. The app uses live free place data, then builds a short direction round from the selected area.

score.label: Score
score.roundCompleteDescription: Keep the same places and start again, or reset and try a different pair.

search.placeholder: Search a city, area, or landmark

question.label: Question {{index}}
question.title: Where is {{to}} from {{from}}?
question.hint: Choose the strongest direction based on the coordinates.
question.wrong: Not quite. The best answer is {{answer}}.

errors.roundBuild: Could not build 5 questions for this place yet. Try a bigger area or landmark.
errors.roundFailed: Failed to create the question set.
